textDisplay:
"this is boys playing with dolls or girls kicking a football" no. It absolutely is not. It is young people that are experiencing distress with their gender. We are talking about specialised care to help them. Toddlers do not medically transition in the UK at all. Some children were prescribed hormone blockers before the Cass Report (which has been proven to be bias). Children have never had gender related surgeries in the UK - that has always been handled by the adult services that they get handed over to at 18.

You know when we have "transitioned" babies? Intersex people. Until VERY recent times it was relatively standard that when a baby is born with a DSD or any kind of "ambiguous genitalia" the doctor would operate on the baby to align their body with gender norms and encourage the parent to raise them in accordance to the surgery performed... This leads to a very confused human with a lot of unpicking to do... but that is the only "gender affirming surgery" that has ever been given to a minor in the UK and completely without their knowledge and consent.

Zero media coverage about medically treating a baby into something that assimilates heteronormativity - but a toddler wants a haircut and a to be called another name and its on GB News.

textDisplay:
Funny how much easier it is to recognize that this is CLEARLY just a result of extreme parental sexism and homophobia, in the case of toddlers that are deemed to be “trans”. (Well, or Munchausen by Proxy, which can also co-occur with it, in many of these cases.) Likely due to the fact that it is so OBVIOUSLY insane, and everything looks much simpler in the case of toddlers, as they have not yet developed complex brains, with complexly distorted worldviews, providing complex justifications for things, and living by complex defective coping mechanisms, like adults do. 

Although really, if you actually think about it, and you pull back the culturally imposed veil before your eyes, which is that you have to unquestioningly accept the created social construct that is “trans”, or else you’re horrible? And you instead just see this stuff for exactly what it is, without using that word / idea / culturally created concept to excuse it? You will see that is really EXACTLY the same thing in the case of adults who say they’re “trans”, too!! Just with a few more variables, like for instance adult male f3t1sh1sm, playing into it. But all in all, with adults, too..? The whole thing is based in (internalized) sexism and homophobia, just like with the toddlers. Which has then been socially elevated, to the point that we are supposed to see it as something progressive and wonderful.

Anyway, I am personally also SO done with “adults can just do whatever they want”. The medical system should in NO way provide wrong sex hormones and gender surgeries to physically healthy people, for the sake of a strongly held delusion that they have! Just like we don’t give people with EDs “affirmative” liposuction, either! These people’s problem is in their MINDS, and there is nothing wrong with their bodies! You don’t destroy healthy bodies for the sake of mental illness! Plus that is not even getting into all of the EXTREMELY deleterious effects “affirming” this crap in any way has on society, and especially women’s rights, and the minds of vulnerable young people, who fall prey to this insidious mind virus!! Literally SO done, and we need to just end the WHOLE entire medicalization aspect of this!! Ban it, all across the board.
